TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Sihodingan = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Sihodingan. 5,577 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 15,330 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 1,394 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 13,936 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis5%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = siħodiŋan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ siħodiŋan. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, **,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan **,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis*%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Sihodingan = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Sihodingan. 5,577 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 15,330 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 9% niqan 1,394 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 91% niqan 13,936 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis5%, Paiwan1%, Puyuma1%, ni rahuq na o2%.
S.PHON: = siħodiŋan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ siħodiŋan. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, **,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan **,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis*%, paiwan*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
